User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user within the BookYourBrands CRM.

profilePic.description: URL of the user's profile picture.

Project.title: Project
Project.description: Represents a project managed within the CRM.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the project was created.

status.description: Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed).

Task.title: Task
Task.description: Represents a task within a project.

assignedTo.description: Reference to User (Team Member). (Relationship: User 1:N Task)

status.description: Current status of the task (pending, in progress, completed).

Chat.title: Chat
Chat.description: Represents a chat room for a project.

Message.title: Message
Message.description: Represents a message within a chat room.

senderId.description: Reference to User who sent the message.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the message was sent.

fileURL.description: URL of the file attached to the message (if any).

File.title: File
File.description: Represents a file uploaded within a project.

uploadedBy.description: Reference to User who uploaded the file.

fileType.description: Type of the file (e.g., video, document).

fileURL.description: URL of the file stored in Firebase Storage.

definition.description: Stores user data. User ID is used for path-based ownership.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

definition.description: Stores project data, nested under the client.  This enables path-based rules that associate projects to the client.

params.name: clientId
params.description: The unique identifier for the client.

params.name: projectId
params.description: The unique identifier for the project.

definition.description: Stores task data, nested under the project.  This enables path-based rules that associate tasks to the project and client.

params.name: clientId
params.description: The unique identifier for the client.

params.name: projectId
params.description: The unique identifier for the project.

params.name: taskId
params.description: The unique identifier for the task.

definition.description: Stores messages within a specific project chat.

params.name: projectId
params.description: The unique identifier for the project.

params.name: chatId
params.description: The unique identifier for the chat.

params.name: messageId
params.description: The unique identifier for the message.

definition.description: Stores messages within a specific support chat.

params.name: messageId
params.description: The unique identifier for the message.

definition.description: Stores file metadata associated with a project.

params.name: projectId
params.description: The unique identifier for the project.

params.name: fileId
params.description: The unique identifier for the file.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore structure is designed to ensure authorization independence, clarity, and scalability. User data is stored in `/users/{userId}`. Projects are stored under their respective clients to establish ownership. Tasks are nested under projects. Project chats are stored in a dedicated subcollection under each project. Direct support chats are stored in a top-level `supportChats` collection, where the document ID is a composite of the two users' IDs, ensuring a unique chat room for each pair. This design allows for secure list operations and avoids `get()` calls in security rules by using path-based access control.
